description_long: This is a square, light green pillow with a smooth, slightly lustrous fabric surface, likely made of cotton as indicated by the visible text. The pillow appears well-stuffed, giving it a plump and inviting appearance, with slightly flared corners and subtle seam lines along the edges. The surface is free of any visible stains or marks, suggesting it is clean and well-maintained. On one corner, there is a black and white printed label or logo with Asian characters and '100%' text, which stands out against the otherwise solid color. The pillow's fabric has a soft sheen, and the overall shape is symmetrical with a gentle puffiness. There are no visible zippers, buttons, or other interactive features, and the pillow is shown isolated against a plain background.
description: A plump, light green square pillow with a smooth, slightly shiny cotton surface and a black-and-white label in one corner. The pillow is clean, well-stuffed, and has no visible stains or extra features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full square face of the light green pillow with a black-and-white label in the upper left corner.
description_view_1: Top-down view revealing the pillow's thickness and puffiness, with the label barely visible at the tip.
description_view_2: Back view of the pillow, similar to the front but with the label now in the upper right corner.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view showing the pillow's thickness and the label at the tip, mirroring the top-down view.
attribute_brand_logo: black-and-white printed logo with Asian characters and '100%' in the upper corner
attribute_tag_or_label: black-and-white printed label in the upper corner
